ability-urge.effect_en: Forcibly activates a friendly Pokémon’s ability.
ability-urge.effect_long_en: Used on a party Pokémon in battle :   Selects another friendly Pokémon at random.  If that Pokémon’s ability is normally activated by some condition—i.e., is not continuous and passive—its effect is forcibly activated.  This item can only be obtained or used via the Wonder Launcher.

air-mail.effect_en: Lets a Trainer write a message and send it via Pokémon trade.
air-mail.effect_long_en: Used to send short messages to other players via Pokémon trading.  Trainer may compose a message from a finite list of words when giving this item to a Pokémon.  Once taken and read, a message may be erased and this item can be reused, or the message may be stored in the trainer’s PC.  Held :   Holder cannot be placed in the PC.  Any move attempting to remove this item from the holder will fail.

bloom-mail.effect_en: Lets a Trainer write a message and send it via Pokémon trade.
bloom-mail.effect_long_en: Used to send short messages to other players via Pokémon trading.  Trainer may compose a message from a finite list of words when giving this item to a Pokémon.  Once taken and read, a message may be erased and this item can be reused, or the message may be stored in the trainer’s PC.  Held :   Holder cannot be placed in the PC.  Any move attempting to remove this item from the holder will fail.

blue-shard.effect_en: No effect. Can be traded for items or moves.
blue-shard.effect_long_en: No effect.  In Diamond and Pearl, trade ten for a Rain Dance TM in the house midway along the southern section of Route 212.  In Platinum, trade to move tutors on Route 212, in Snowpoint City, and in the Survival Area.  Eight shards total are required per tutelage, but the particular combination of colors varies by move.  In HeartGold and SoulSilver, trade one for a Chesto Berry, an Oran Berry, and a Wiki Berry with the Juggler near the Pokémon Center in Violet City.  In HeartGold and SoulSilver, trade one for a Bluk Berry, a Cornn Berry, and a Kelpsy Berry with the Juggler near the Pal Park entrance in Fuchsia City.

brick-mail.effect_long_en: Used to send short messages to other players via Pokémon trading.  Trainer may compose a message from a finite list of words when giving this item to a Pokémon. Any move attempting to remove this item from the holder will fail.

bridge-mail-v.effect_long_en: Used to send short messages to other players via Pokémon trading.  Trainer may compose a message from a finite list of words when giving this item to a Pokémon.  Once taken and read, a message may be erased and this item can be reused, or the message may be stored in the trainer’s PC.  Held :   Holder cannot be placed in the PC.  Any move attempting to remove this item from the holder will fail.

choice-scarf.effect_en: Held: Increases Speed by 50%, but restricts the holder to only one move.
choice-scarf.effect_long_en: Held: Increases the holder’s Speed by 50%, but restricts it to the first move it uses until it leaves battle or loses this item.  If this item is swapped for another Choice item via Trick or Switcheroo, the holder’s restriction is still lifted, but it will again be restricted to the next move it uses. (Quirk: If the holder is switched in by U-Turn and it also knows U-Turn, U-Turn becomes its restricted move.)

dream-mail.effect_en: Lets a Trainer write a message and send it via Pokémon trade.
dream-mail.effect_long_en: Used to send short messages to other players via Pokémon trading.  Trainer may compose a message from a finite list of words when giving this item to a Pokémon.  Once taken and read, a message may be erased and this item can be reused, or the message may be stored in the trainer’s PC.  Held :   Holder cannot be placed in the PC.  Any move attempting to remove this item from the holder will fail.

fab-mail.effect_en: Lets a Trainer write a message and send it via Pokémon trade.
fab-mail.effect_long_en: Used to send short messages to other players via Pokémon trading.  Trainer may compose a message from a finite list of words when giving this item to a Pokémon.  Once taken and read, a message may be erased and this item can be reused, or the message may be stored in the trainer’s PC.  Held :   Holder cannot be placed in the PC.  Any move attempting to remove this item from the holder will fail.

flame-mail.effect_long_en: Used to send short messages to other players via Pokémon trading.  Trainer may compose a message from a finite list of words when giving this item to a Pokémon.  Once taken and read, a message may be erased and this item can be reused, or the message may be stored in the trainer’s PC.  Held :   Holder cannot be placed in the PC.  Any move attempting to remove this item from the holder will fail.

focus-sash.effect_en: Held: Holder survives any single-hit attack at 1 HP if at max HP, then the item is consumed.
focus-sash.effect_long_en: Held: If the holder has full HP and is attacked for regular damage that would faint it, this item is consumed and prevents the holder’s HP from lowering below 1.  This effect works against multi-hit attacks, but does not work against the effects of Doom Desire or Future Sight.

full-incense.effect_en: Held: Holder moves last in its priority bracket. Breeding: Snorlax begets a Munchlax Egg.
full-incense.effect_long_en: Held: The holder will go last within its move’s priority bracket, regardless of Speed.  If multiple Pokémon within the same priority bracket are subject to this effect, the slower Pokémon will go first.  The holder will move after Pokémon with Stall.  If the holder has Stall, Stall is ignored.  This item ignores Trick Room.

fr.Épée et Bouclier: Un bracelet confectionné à partir de Branches Galanoa. Les Ramoloss de Galar adorent en porter.

en.Épée et Bouclier: A cuff made from woven-together Galarica Twigs. Giving it to Galarian Slowpoke makes the Pokémon very happy.

de.Épée et Bouclier: Ein Armreif, der aus Galarnuss-Zweigen gewoben wird. Galar-Flegmon freuen sich, wenn sie diesen anlegen dürfen.

es.Épée et Bouclier: Un brazalete hecho de Ramas de Galanuez trenzadas. Los Slowpoke de Galar se ponen contentísimos si lo reciben como regalo.

ja.Épée et Bouclier: ガラナツのえだを　編み込んだ　ブレスレット。 ガラル地方の　ヤドンに つけてあげると　喜ぶ。

it.Épée et Bouclier: Un bracciale ottenuto intrecciando Rami Galarnoce. Gli Slowpoke di Galar amano indossarlo.

ko.Épée et Bouclier: 가라두구가지를 엮어서 만든 팔찌. 가라르지방의 야돈에게 채워주면 기뻐한다.

fr.Épée et Bouclier: Une branche de Galanoa, un arbre qui pousse dans certains endroits de Galar. Elle sert à fabriquer des accessoires pour un Pokémon en particulier.

en.Épée et Bouclier: A twig from a species of tree called Galarica that grows in certain areas around the Galar region. It’s a material for an accessory for a certain Pokémon.

de.Épée et Bouclier: Ein Zweig eines Baumes namens Galarnuss, der in Teilen der Galar-Region wächst. Er dient als Material zur Herstellung von Schmuck für ein bestimmtes Pokémon.

es.Épée et Bouclier: Una rama de un árbol llamado Galanuez, que crece en determinadas zonas de Galar. Con ella se pueden crear accesorios para cierto Pokémon.

ja.Épée et Bouclier: ガラル地方の　一部に　生える ガラナツという　木の枝。　とある　ポケモンの アクセサリーの　材料として　使われる。

it.Épée et Bouclier: Un ramo di Galarnoce, un albero che cresce in alcune zone di Galar. Viene usato per realizzare accessori per un certo Pokémon.

ko.Épée et Bouclier: 가라르지방의 일부 지역에서 자라는 가라두구라는 나무의 가지. 어떤 포켓몬의 액세서리 재료로 쓰인다.

fr.Épée et Bouclier: Une couronne confectionnée à partir de Branches Galanoa. Les Ramoloss de Galar adorent en porter.

en.Épée et Bouclier: A wreath made from woven-together Galarica Twigs. Placing it on the head of a Galarian Slowpoke makes the Pokémon very happy.

de.Épée et Bouclier: Ein Kranz, der aus Galarnuss-Zweigen gewoben wurde. Galar-Flegmon freuen sich, wenn sie diesen tragen dürfen.

es.Épée et Bouclier: Una corona hecha de Ramas de Galanuez trenzadas. Los Slowpoke de Galar se ponen contentísimos cuando la llevan puesta.

ja.Épée et Bouclier: ガラナツのえだを　編み込んだ　冠。 ガラル地方の　ヤドンに かぶせてあげると　喜ぶ。

it.Épée et Bouclier: Una corona ottenuta intrecciando Rami Galarnoce. Gli Slowpoke di Galar amano indossarla.

Once taken and read, a message may be erased and this item can be reused, or the message may be stored in the trainer’s PC.  Held :   Holder cannot be placed in the PC.  Any move attempting to remove this item from the holder will fail.

Once taken and read, a message may be erased and this item can be reused, or the message may be stored in the trainer’s PC.  Held :   Holder cannot be placed in the PC.  Any move attempting to remove this item from the holder will fail.

green-shard.effect_en: No effect. Can be traded for items or moves.
green-shard.effect_long_en: No effect.  In Diamond and Pearl, trade ten for a Hail TM in the house midway along the southern section of Route 212.  In Platinum, trade to move tutors on Route 212, in Snowpoint City, and in the Survival Area.  Eight shards total are required per tutelage, but the particular combination of colors varies by move.  In HeartGold and SoulSilver, trade one for an Aguav Berry, a Lum Berry, and a Rawst Berry with the Juggler near the Pokémon Center in Violet City.  In HeartGold and SoulSilver, trade one for a Durin Berry, a Hondew Berry, and a Wepear Berry with the Juggler near the Pal Park entrance in Fuchsia City.

greet-mail.effect_long_en: Used to send short messages to other players via Pokémon trading.  Trainer may compose a message from a finite list of words when giving this item to a Pokémon.  Once taken and read, a message may be erased and this item can be reused, or the message may be stored in the trainer’s PC.  Held :   Holder cannot be placed in the PC.  Any move attempting to remove this item from the holder will fail.

harbor-mail.effect_en: Lets a Trainer write a message and send it via Pokémon trade.
harbor-mail.effect_long_en: Used to send short messages to other players via Pokémon trading.  Trainer may compose a message from a finite list of words when giving this item to a Pokémon.  Once taken and read, a message may be erased and this item can be reused, or the message may be stored in the trainer’s PC.  Held :   Holder cannot be placed in the PC.  Any move attempting to remove this item from the holder will fail.

inquiry-mail.effect_long_en: Used to send short messages to other players via Pokémon trading.  Trainer may compose a message from a finite list of words when giving this item to a Pokémon.  Once taken and read, a message may be erased and this item can be reused, or the message may be stored in the trainer’s PC.  Held :   Holder cannot be placed in the PC.  Any move attempting to remove this item from the holder will fail.

kings-rock.effect_en: Held: Damaging moves gain a 10% chance to make their target flinch. Traded on a Poliwhirl: Holder evolves into Politoed. Traded on a Slowpoke: Holder evolves into Slowking.
kings-rock.effect_long_en: Held in battle :   Holder’s damaging moves have a 10% chance to make their target flinch.  This chance applies independently to each hit of a multi-hit move.      This item’s chance is rolled independently of any other move effects; e.g., a move with a 30% chance to flinch normally will have a 37% total chance to flinch when used with this item, because 3% of the time, both effects activate.  Held by Poliwhirl or Slowbro :   Holder evolves into Politoed or Slowking, respectively, when traded.

lagging-tail.effect_en: Held: Holder moves last in its priority bracket.
lagging-tail.effect_long_en: Held: The holder will go last within its move’s priority bracket, regardless of Speed.  If multiple Pokémon within the same priority bracket are subject to this effect, the slower Pokémon will go first.  The holder will move after Pokémon with Stall.  If the holder has Stall, Stall is ignored.  This item ignores Trick Room.

like-mail.effect_long_en: Used to send short messages to other players via Pokémon trading.  Trainer may compose a message from a finite list of words when giving this item to a Pokémon.  Once taken and read, a message may be erased and this item can be reused, or the message may be stored in the trainer’s PC.  Held :   Holder cannot be placed in the PC.  Any move attempting to remove this item from the holder will fail.

mech-mail.effect_long_en: Used to send short messages to other players via Pokémon trading.  Trainer may compose a message from a finite list of words when giving this item to a Pokémon.  Once taken and read, a message may be erased and this item can be reused, or the message may be stored in the trainer’s PC.  Held :   Holder cannot be placed in the PC.  Any move attempting to remove this item from the holder will fail.

mosaic-mail.effect_long_en: Used to send short messages to other players via Pokémon trading.  Trainer may compose a message from a finite list of words when giving this item to a Pokémon.  Once taken and read, a message may be erased and this item can be reused, or the message may be stored in the trainer’s PC.  Held :   Holder cannot be placed in the PC.  Any move attempting to remove this item from the holder will fail.

orange-mail.effect_en: Lets a Trainer write a message and send it via Pokémon trade.
orange-mail.effect_long_en: Used to send short messages to other players via Pokémon trading.  Trainer may compose a message from a finite list of words when giving this item to a Pokémon. red-shard.effect_en: No effect. Can be traded for items or moves.
red-shard.effect_long_en: No effect.  In Diamond and Pearl, trade ten for a Sunny Day TM in the house midway along the southern section of Route 212.  In Platinum, trade to move tutors on Route 212, in Snowpoint City, and in the Survival Area.  Eight shards total are required per tutelage, but the particular combination of colors varies by move.  In HeartGold and SoulSilver, trade one for a Cheri Berry, a Leppa Berry, and a Pecha Berry with the Juggler near the Pokémon Center in Violet City.  In HeartGold and SoulSilver, trade one for a Persim Berry, a Pomeg Berry, and a Razz Berry with the Juggler near the Pal Park entrance in Fuchsia City.

reply-mail.effect_en: Lets a Trainer write a message and send it via Pokémon trade.
reply-mail.effect_long_en: Used to send short messages to other players via Pokémon trading.  Trainer may compose a message from a finite list of words when giving this item to a Pokémon.  Once taken and read, a message may be erased and this item can be reused, or the message may be stored in the trainer’s PC.  Held :   Holder cannot be placed in the PC.  Any move attempting to remove this item from the holder will fail.

rsvp-mail.effect_en: Lets a Trainer write a message and send it via Pokémon trade.
rsvp-mail.effect_long_en: Used to send short messages to other players via Pokémon trading.  Trainer may compose a message from a finite list of words when giving this item to a Pokémon.  Once taken and read, a message may be erased and this item can be reused, or the message may be stored in the trainer’s PC.  Held :   Holder cannot be placed in the PC.  Any move attempting to remove this item from the holder will fail.

fr.Épée et Bouclier: On raconte que ce bouclier fut jadis utilisé par un héros pour vaincre une calamité. À présent, il est tout usé et rouillé.

en.Épée et Bouclier: It is said that a hero used this shield to halt a terrible disaster in ancient times. But it’s grown rusty and worn.

de.Épée et Bouclier: Mit diesem Schild soll ein Held einstmals großes Unheil abgewendet haben. Rost sowie der Zahn der Zeit haben jedoch ihre Spuren hinterlassen.

es.Épée et Bouclier: Cuenta una antigua leyenda que un valiente héroe asió este escudo para hacer frente a un cataclismo, pero ahora está oxidado y en un estado lamentable.

ja.Épée et Bouclier: 大昔の　英雄が　災厄を 討ち払ったと　伝えられる　盾　だが いまは　さびて　ボロボロに　なっている。

it.Épée et Bouclier: Si racconta che in passato un eroe riuscì a respingere la calamità servendosi di questo scudo. Ora è tutto arrugginito e rovinato.

shadow-mail.effect_long_en: Used to send short messages to other players via Pokémon trading.  Trainer may compose a message from a finite list of words when giving this item to a Pokémon.  Once taken and read, a message may be erased and this item can be reused, or the message may be stored in the trainer’s PC.  Held :   Holder cannot be placed in the PC.  Any move attempting to remove this item from the holder will fail.

snow-mail.effect_long_en: Used to send short messages to other players via Pokémon trading.  Trainer may compose a message from a finite list of words when giving this item to a Pokémon.  Once taken and read, a message may be erased and this item can be reused, or the message may be stored in the trainer’s PC.  Held :   Holder cannot be placed in the PC.  Any move attempting to remove this item from the holder will fail.

space-mail.effect_long_en: Used to send short messages to other players via Pokémon trading.  Trainer may compose a message from a finite list of words when giving this item to a Pokémon.  Once taken and read, a message may be erased and this item can be reused, or the message may be stored in the trainer’s PC.  Held :   Holder cannot be placed in the PC.  Any move attempting to remove this item from the holder will fail.

steel-mail.effect_en: Lets a Trainer write a message and send it via Pokémon trade.
steel-mail.effect_long_en: Used to send short messages to other players via Pokémon trading.  Trainer may compose a message from a finite list of words when giving this item to a Pokémon.  Once taken and read, a message may be erased and this item can be reused, or the message may be stored in the trainer’s PC.  Held :   Holder cannot be placed in the PC.  Any move attempting to remove this item from the holder will fail.

Once taken and read, a message may be erased and this item can be reused, or the message may be stored in the trainer’s PC.  Held :   Holder cannot be placed in the PC.  Any move attempting to remove this item from the holder will fail.

tropic-mail.effect_en: Lets a Trainer write a message and send it via Pokémon trade.
tropic-mail.effect_long_en: Used to send short messages to other players via Pokémon trading.  Trainer may compose a message from a finite list of words when giving this item to a Pokémon.  Once taken and read, a message may be erased and this item can be reused, or the message may be stored in the trainer’s PC.  Held :   Holder cannot be placed in the PC.  Any move attempting to remove this item from the holder will fail.

wave-mail.effect_long_en: Used to send short messages to other players via Pokémon trading.  Trainer may compose a message from a finite list of words when giving this item to a Pokémon.  Once taken and read, a message may be erased and this item can be reused, or the message may be stored in the trainer’s PC.  Held :   Holder cannot be placed in the PC.  Any move attempting to remove this item from the holder will fail.

wood-mail.effect_en: Lets a Trainer write a message and send it via Pokémon trade.
wood-mail.effect_long_en: Used to send short messages to other players via Pokémon trading.  Trainer may compose a message from a finite list of words when giving this item to a Pokémon.  Once taken and read, a message may be erased and this item can be reused, or the message may be stored in the trainer’s PC.  Held :   Holder cannot be placed in the PC.  Any move attempting to remove this item from the holder will fail.

yellow-shard.effect_en: No effect. Can be traded for items or moves.
yellow-shard.effect_long_en: No effect.  In Diamond and Pearl, trade ten for a Sandstorm TM in the house midway along the southern section of Route 212.  In Platinum, trade to move tutors on Route 212, in Snowpoint City, and in the Survival Area.  Eight shards total are required per tutelage, but the particular combination of colors varies by move.  In HeartGold and SoulSilver, trade one for an Aspear Berry, a Iapapa Berry, and a Sitrus Berry with the Juggler near the Pokémon Center in Violet City.  In HeartGold and SoulSilver, trade one for a Grepa Berry, a Nomel Berry, and a Pinap Berry with the Juggler near the Pal Park entrance in Fuchsia City.

de.X et Y: Ein Item zum Tragen. Agiert das Ziel zuerst, erhöht sich die Genauigkeit des Trägers.
de.Soleil et Lune: Ein Item zum Tragen. Agiert das Ziel zuerst, erhöht sich die Genauigkeit des Trägers.
de.Ultra-Soleil et Ultra-Lune: Ein Item zum Tragen. Agiert das Ziel zuerst, erhöht sich die Genauigkeit des Trägers.

de.Épée et Bouclier: Ein Item zum Tragen. Agiert das Ziel zuerst, erhöht sich die Genauigkeit des Trägers.

es.X et Y: Potencia la Velocidad de base, pero reduce la Velocidad en combate. Debe llevarla un Pokémon.
es.Soleil et Lune: Debe llevarlo un Pokémon. Si se mueve después del enemigo, aumenta la Precisión del Pokémon.
